params.prompt: Create a premium 4:5 Instagram PROGRAM GRAPHIC for Limitless Club. Course: HERMES AGENT — Multi-Agent AI Masterclass. Style: Midnight Luxe Editorial, black charcoal, chrome silver, electric blue rim light, elegant serif headline, clean modern sans. Visual: refined futuristic AI android portrait on right, tasteful and not too large, like a premium assistant from an executive AI operating system. Text layout: LIMITLESS CLUB top; HERMES AGENT large left; Multi-Agent AI Masterclass; quote: Build the team that never sleeps.; Thai positioning: คอร์สที่จะเปลี่ยน AI ให้เป็น “ทีมงาน” ของคุณ; lower three chips: Chief of Staff Agent, Content Agent, Vibe Coding Agent; bottom CTA: สร้างทีม AI Agent ที่ทำงาน 24/7; footer: By Jedi Trinupab · @jeditrinupab. Make it beautiful, premium, less busy than typical AI posters, all text readable, safe margins, no extra logos, no duplicate text.
